response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack/web developer with strong testing culture and some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments, but lacks the core requirements for this role: native-level Japanese, embedded firmware experience, Linux kernel modification, LAN-switch/networking security stack (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF/SNMP), and recent C-on-UNIX work. Background centers on TypeScript/Node.js/DLang web and platform work, which does not align with embedded security feature development.
strengths: Long track record of professional software development with TDD and CI/CD discipline
Some C/C++ experience writing components for NI LabWindows/CVI
Comfortable across multiple languages, Linux environments, and Git/Docker tooling
concerns: No evidence of native-level Japanese proficiency (hard requirement)
No embedded firmware, Linux kernel modification, or LAN-switch/networking security experience
C programming and low-level UNIX work are not recent or central to the career

key_factors.factor: Prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
